Briar.trading_pattern: Briar has early burst and tankiness. Play defensive and respect her all-in.
Briar.ability_to_dodge: Briar Q (Flame Charge) — step back when she dashes.
Briar.early_game: Play very defensively. Briar has strong early all-in.
Briar.mid_game: Use ult defensively. Space in teamfights.
Briar.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through teamfight coordination.
Briar.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Briar.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Never walk into melee range.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has tankiness and early damage. Respect his all-in and farm safely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — dodge by stepping to the side.
Sion.early_game: Play defensively. Sion has strong early all-in.
Sion.mid_game: Use ult defensively. Space in teamfights.
Sion.late_game: He becomes very tanky. Maintain distance.
Sion.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales — his tankiness increases late
Sion.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Never walk into his all-in range.

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol has superior waveclear and roam. Farm safely and respect his scaling.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W (Celestial Expansion) — stay at range.
Aurelion Sol.early_game: Farm defensively. Aurelion Sol pushes and roams better.
Aurelion Sol.late_game: He outscales in roaming impact. Use ult defensively.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Aurelion Sol outscales — his teamfight control is superior
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Use ult defensively.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Keep maximum distance and farm safely.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum the Waters) — move away from shark impact.
Fizz.early_game: Play very defensively. Fizz has strong all-in.
Fizz.mid_game: Use ult defensively when he engages. Space in fights.
Fizz.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Fizz.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Fizz.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Fizz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use ult defensively.

Xerath.trading_pattern: Xerath outranges you significantly. Farm safely and respect his range.
Xerath.ability_to_dodge: Xerath Q (Runic Barrage) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Xerath.early_game: Play very defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Xerath.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Use ult defensively.
Xerath.late_game: He outscales in poke damage. Use ult for defense.
Xerath.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through teamfights.
Xerath.scaling: Xerath outscales — his poke range is overwhelming
Xerath.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use minions for cover.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia has sustained poke and poison. Trade carefully when her abilities are down.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Play defensively. Cassio has strong poke.
Cassiopeia.late_game: She outscales in sustained damage. Maintain distance.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage is overwhelming
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Avoid poison zones.

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you. Space carefully and farm defensively.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge by stepping away.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Farm defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Use ult defensively.
Vel'Koz.late_game: He outscales. Use ult for defense.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through teamfights.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his sustained poke is overwhelming
Vel'Koz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use minions for cover.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use Q to farm and poke freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range.
Azir.early_game: Dominate with poke. Azir struggles early.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.late_game: He outscales. Finish before his control becomes oppressive.
Azir.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use poke to maintain pressure. Maintain mid control.

Vex.trading_pattern: Vex has poke and CC. Trade when her abilities are down.
Vex.ability_to_dodge: Vex E (Looming Darkness) — dodge by staying outside zone.
Vex.early_game: Play defensively. Vex has decent early poke.
Vex.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Vex.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Vex.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Use ult defensively.

Yone.trading_pattern: Yone is weak early to ranged poke. Spam poke and farm.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — abuse cooldown when he returns.
Yone.early_game: Dominate with poke. Yone is weak to ranged harassment.
Yone.late_game: He outscales with items. Finish before he gets tanky.
Yone.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Yone scales.
Yone.scaling: Yone outscales — his itemization is superior
Yone.positioning: Use poke to maintain distance. Never trade close range.

Corki.trading_pattern: Corki is weak early. Spam poke and farm freely.
Corki.ability_to_dodge: Corki Q (Phosphorus Bomb) — dodge by stepping back.
Corki.early_game: Dominate with poke. Corki is weak early.
Corki.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Corki.late_game: He outscales. Finish before he becomes oppressive.
Corki.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Corki scales.
Corki.scaling: Corki outscales — his split-push and poke are superior
Corki.positioning: Use poke to maintain distance. Maintain mid control.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is very weak early. Spam poke and farm freely.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back.
Smolder.early_game: Completely dominate with poke. Farm freely.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Get a lead and snowball. Finish before Smolder scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Use poke to abuse. Push him off farm.

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko is mobile with poke. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ekko.ability_to_dodge: Ekko W (Parallel Convergence) — dodge stun zone.
Ekko.early_game: Trade when he's vulnerable. Both have similar scaling.
Ekko.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Ekko.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Ekko.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Use ult defensively.

Syndra.trading_pattern: Syndra has poke and CC. Trade when her abilities are down.
Syndra.ability_to_dodge: Syndra E (Scatter the Weak) — dodge by moving away.
Syndra.early_game: Play defensively. Syndra has strong early poke.
Syndra.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Syndra.scaling: Syndra slightly favored — her spike potential is higher
Syndra.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Avoid orb zones.

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir is weak early. Use poke to farm and suppress.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: Vladimir Q (Transfusion) — stay out of his range.
Vladimir.early_game: Dominate early with poke. Don't let him get fed.
Vladimir.late_game: He outscales. Finish before he becomes oppressive.
Vladimir.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Vladimir scales.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales — his teamfight sustain is overwhelming
Vladimir.positioning: Use poke to maintain pressure. Stay out of his Q range.

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has poke and mobility. Trade when her abilities are down.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q (Orb of Deception) — dodge by stepping sideways.
Ahri.early_game: Trade when abilities are down. Both have similar early game.
Ahri.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored — her mobility is superior
Ahri.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Use ult defensively.

Viktor.trading_pattern: Viktor has good early poke with E. Trade when his abilities are down.
Viktor.ability_to_dodge: Viktor E (Death Ray) — dodge by stepping perpendicular.
Viktor.early_game: Play defensively. Viktor has good early poke.
Viktor.late_game: He outscales. Use ult for defense.
Viktor.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through teamfights.
Viktor.scaling: Viktor outscales — his itemization and burst are superior
Viktor.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Avoid his E zone.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has poke and control. Trade when her ball is far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Orianna.late_game: She outscales slightly. Use ult for defense.
Orianna.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Keep away from her ball.

Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has tankiness and CC. Play defensive and farm safely.
Swain.ability_to_dodge: Swain E (Nevermove) — dodge by moving sideways.
Swain.mid_game: Use ult defensively. Space in teamfights.
Swain.win_condition: Survive early, use ult defensively. Win through poke.
Swain.scaling: Swain outscales — his tankiness increases late
Swain.positioning: Keep distance with poke. Never walk into his all-in range.
